description:
In Casebox (already open in Firefox at http://localhost/c/default), log in as admin (Username: root, Password: Admin1234!) and use the search functionality to find the case folder named 'Big Brother Watch v. UK [GC] - App. 58170/13'.

This is a real European Court of Human Rights (ECHR) Grand Chamber case about mass surveillance. It should be located under the 'ECHR Case Documentation' folder.

Steps:
1. Log in with the admin credentials if not already logged in
2. Use the search bar/field in Casebox to search for 'Big Brother Watch'
3. Locate and click on the result 'Big Brother Watch v. UK [GC] - App. 58170/13'
4. The case folder details should be visible in the right panel

After completing the search, the case folder should be selected and its details visible in the Casebox interface.

metadata.expected_result: Big Brother Watch v. UK [GC] - App. 58170/13
